# Nuclear Gaming — Game QA & DevOps Support

## Overview

Nuclear Gaming is a game development project targeting **Unity WebGL and HTML5 environments**.

My work focused on ensuring the **quality, stability, and reliability of the game before releases**, while also supporting infrastructure improvements for development workflows.

## My Role

Worked as a QA Engineer supporting both testing and DevOps operations.

Main activities:

- Manual functional testing
- Bug identification and tracking
- Validation of gameplay flows
- Support for development infrastructure

## Quality Approach

Testing focused on validating:

- Gameplay stability
- UI interactions
- Game logic
- Performance issues

Defects were documented with evidence and tracked to support developer resolution.

## DevOps Contributions

- Assisted in CI/CD pipeline configuration
- Containerization with Docker
- Environment standardization for development and testing

## Technologies

- Unity WebGL
- HTML5
- Docker
- CI/CD pipelines
- Agile development workflows

## Key Contributions

- Improved release stability through systematic testing
- Identified critical gameplay issues before production
- Supported the creation of reproducible development environments
